params.context: Cycle 95 Phase B native capture: harmless 'hello' prompt to NOT trigger APF block, intentionally capturing Google's native wrb.fr response_body.txt for inner_json schema reverse-engineering. 625 PARTIAL revealed: B33 fix correct (wrb_fr framing rendered), but my inner_json `[[<text>,null,null,[],[]]]` is structurally wrong vs native `[null, [c_id, r_id, ...]]`. Test PC artifacts files/626/response_body.txt will contain native wrb.fr inner_json schema (full body, not truncated preview).
